summary: CRITICAL GAPS: SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 is referenced by workflow (line 35) but NOT provided—deliverable is incomplete. Actions not SHA-pinned (actions/checkout@v4 should pin to commit SHA, line 18). Version bump logic flaw: 'multiple-patches' fixture expects 1.0.2 but code increments Patch only once per bump-type, yielding 1.0.1. MockFixtures.ps1 is sophisticated but disconnected—test workflow hardcodes cases instead of leveraging fixture system. Test-ThroughAct.ps1 incomplete: patterns like 'Tests Passed: 20' don't match actual Pester output. No evidence actionlint was run. Missing Set-StrictMode, credential handling best practices.
